{{Fig|A simple way to get the feel of the relative importance of a given [[Glossary:Element|element]] is to look at the '''After''' and '''Before''' fields in the [[Priority queue#Priority queue in SuperMemo|'''Element priority''' dialog box]] (Alt+P). In the picture, an [[Glossary:Extract|extract]] from a Wikipedia [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Glymphatic_system article about the glymphatic system] receives [[Glossary:Priority|priority]] ''42%''. This priority is comparable with [[Glossary:Topic|topic]]s about morpheeins and about the autapse term.}}
